commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining code fix may be small, but maintainers need to choose whether tart should expose full FeatureDesktop now or only a native VNC subset until macOS WebVNC/screenshot support and credential handling are...; Needs attention: The final diff removes command-line password handling, but the managed tart desktop credential boundary still needs maintainer approval.; Review finding: [P1] Guard tart before e... (sha=7c347084bbc4bf8677e7f63bfd017353f756ab3f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds tart `FeatureDesktop`, enables macOS Screen Sharing during desktop lease acquisition, adds `--tart-user`, and updates tart docs/tests for native VNC use.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection for the command-routing issue: adding `FeatureDesktop` makes tart match `supportsDirectSSHWebVNC`, whose remote command requires Linux noVNC tooling on the guest. The credential-dependent screenshot path is also source-reproducible because it reads `/var/db/crabbox/vnc.password`, which the PR no longer provisions.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining code fix may be small, but maintainers need to choose whether tart should expose full `FeatureDesktop` now or only a native VNC subset until macOS WebVNC/screenshot support and credential handling are settled.

target.title: feat(tart): desktop/VNC support via guest Screen Sharing
target.body:
## Summary

Follow-up to the tart provider (#209), which shipped headless and deferred desktop/VNC. This makes `crabbox warmup --provider tart --desktop` + `crabbox webvnc` work, matching the other desktop-capable providers.

## What changed

- Advertise **`FeatureDesktop`** in the tart spec so `--desktop` is accepted.
- During Acquire, for `--desktop` leases, enable the guest's built-in **macOS Screen Sharing** over `tart exec`: enable `com.apple.screensharing` and record the account password at `/var/db/crabbox/vnc.password` (where `webvnc` reads it). The VM still runs `--no-graphics`; Screen Sharing is a network service on `127.0.0.1:5900`.
- Add a configurable guest password (`--tart-password` / `CRABBOX_TART_PASSWORD` / `tart.password`, default `admin` = the cirruslabs base-image default) plus a `--tart-user` flag.

`webvnc` authenticates to macOS with the account (user + password), so the provider records the existing account password rather than resetting it ‚Äî see the fixes below.

## Live proof (Apple Silicon M4 Pro, tart 2.32.1, macOS 26.4)

Built from this branch on the Mac and run end-to-end:

```
$ crabbox warmup --provider tart --desktop --slug vncok2
provisioning provider=tart lease=cbx_‚Ä¶ slug=vncok2 image=ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-sequoia-base:latest cpus=4 memory=8192MB keep=true
provisioned lease=cbx_‚Ä¶ instance=crabbox-vncok2-‚Ä¶ state=ready
ready ssh=admin@192.168.64.10:22 network=public workroot=/Users/admin/crabbox
warmup complete total=19.254s

$ crabbox run --provider tart --id cbx_‚Ä¶ -- '<probe screen sharing>'
VNC_5900_OPEN                       # nc -z 127.0.0.1 5900 succeeds
vnc_pw_len=5                        # /var/db/crabbox/vnc.password present
exit=0

$ crabbox run ‚Ä¶ -- 'exec 3<>/dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/5900; head -c 12 <&3'
RFB 003.889                         # real macOS Screen Sharing VNC server answering

$ crabbox list --provider tart
crabbox-vncok2-‚Ä¶  ready  ‚Ä¶  slug=vncok2 keep=true target=macos

$ crabbox stop --provider tart --id cbx_‚Ä¶
released lease=cbx_‚Ä¶ instance=crabbox-vncok2-‚Ä¶
# verify: 0 in `crabbox list`, 0 in `tart list` (clean teardown)
```

## Fixes found by the live proof

Two runtime bugs unit tests couldn't catch (they assert script contents, not execution):

1. **Secure-token password reset** ‚Äî the first cut reset the user's password via `dscl . -passwd`, which fails on cirruslabs' secure-token `admin` account (`eDSAuthFailed`, "please enter old password"). Fixed: record the existing account password instead of resetting it.
2. **`tart exec` doesn't forward stdin/env** ‚Äî an attempt to pipe the password over stdin produced an empty read. Fixed: the password is escaped into the argv script, exactly as the SSH public key already is.

## Files

| File | What |
|------|------|
| `internal/providers/tart/provider.go` | advertise `FeatureDesktop` |
| `internal/providers/tart/backend.go` | `enableScreenSharing` + Acquire hook; default password |
| `internal/providers/tart/flags.go` | `--tart-user`, `--tart-password` |
| `internal/cli/config.go` | `Tart.Password` (YAML/env) |
| `internal/providers/tart/provider_test.go` | tests |
| `docs/providers/tart.md` | Desktop/VNC docs |

## Not included

- VNC-only (no SSH) flow ‚Äî desktop rides on the SSH lease.
- Resolution/scaling controls.
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia
